final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 3x3 character expression grid featuring 赵灵儿 from 仙剑奇侠传 (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a 3D animation, Pixar-style aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 3x3 grid layout (3 rows, 3 columns, 9 panels total), each panel showing the character peeking through a torn hole in white paper
Subject: must include 赵灵儿 as the central character across all 9 panels, must include all 9 expressions and actions as specified:
  Top-left: winking, adjusting glasses, green sweater
  Top-center: smirking, lowering dark sunglasses, red leather jacket
  Top-right: thinking, finger on chin, yellow hoodie
  Middle-left: big smile, arms resting on edge, black and white striped shirt
  Middle-center: smiling, thumbs up, orange button-up shirt
  Middle-right: neutral, drinking boba tea, blue sweater
  Bottom-left: happy, waving, purple sweater vest over white shirt
  Bottom-center: laughing with eyes closed, arms crossed, pink cardigan
  Bottom-right: silly, poking cheeks, teal sweater
Scene/backdrop: must include torn white paper holes as the framing device for each panel
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, expressive character portrait atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must include green, red, yellow, black/white, orange, blue, purple, pink, teal as outfit colors across panels
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "仙剑奇侠传" / "赵灵儿" as character IP identification
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve 9-panel grid structure, all 9 expressions/outfits/actions as listed, character consistency across panels
Avoid: must avoid infringing on official 仙剑奇侠传 artwork — create original interpretation
